description_long: This is a round ceramic plate featuring a vibrant, hand-painted design on one side. The front displays a collage of circular vignettes in warm red and orange hues, depicting various scenes and a central figure in a hat surrounded by foliage and fruit. The reverse side of the plate is decorated with a pattern resembling the cross-sections of wooden logs, each with unique grain and coloration. The rim is thin and appears to be uniformly finished, with a subtle texture visible along the edge. The plate's surface is glossy, suggesting a glazed finish that enhances the vividness of the artwork. The object is likely decorative but could also serve as functional kitchenware.
description: A round, glossy ceramic plate with a colorful, hand-painted collage on the front and a wood log pattern on the back. The plate features a thin rim and a vibrant, artistic finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows a detailed, colorful collage with circular vignettes and a central figure surrounded by plants and fruit.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the plate's thin profile and subtle edge texture, with no visible artwork.
description_view_2: The back view displays a pattern of wood log cross-sections in natural brown tones, with no central figure.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the plate's thin edge, similar to view 1, with no visible artwork.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative painted patterns and scenes are visible on the front and back surfaces.
